cases.prompt:
Exercise the Cursor hook lifecycle for hook plugin 'zoto-spec-system' during phase 'sessionStart'.
Hook command line: node hooks/zoto-session-start.mjs
Description: Spec System: Check for unprocessed specs and nudge user
Confirm stdout JSON contract and absence of blocking prompts.

files.content: # missing on disk fixture for hooks/zoto-session-start.mjs

cases.expected_output: Exit status 0; hook script zoto-session-start.mjs completed without prompting.
assertions: sessionStart hook entry ran the configured script without unresolved needs_user_input
No askQuestion emitted from hook binaries — stdin/stdout hooks channel only
Behaviour matched hooks.json description excerpt: Spec System: Check for unprocessed specs and nudge user

primitive_analysis.summary: The bundle wires sessionStart to a Node runner that scans for unprocessed specs and nudges the operator, and stop to a Node runner that checks subtask status consistency and may reconcile markdown or YAML drift before surfacing hard failures.
